feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Need to change the Posting date into delivery note SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need to change the posting date of delivery note which was already created.  

Delivery note was already created into system and need to change the posting date. 

SAP Business One, SAP B1.

 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Sales Quotation Item Master Data UDF not in remembered list
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help confirm Sales Quotation Item Master Data UDF will not display remembered list when typing the same value?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Service Layer Warehouse Code Issue for Sales Order Drafts
entry.content:
We encounter an issue with the Service Layer when creating a Sales Order draft. Specifically, the warehouse code for items in the draft can differ from the warehouse code in the base Sales Quotation. Although our JSON request includes the updated warehouse code, the Service Layer call appears to default to the warehouse code from the Sales Quotation when generating the draft.

Here is a sample JSON for the Sales Order draft. The WhsCode value (NV00002) varies from the base Sales Quotation WhsCode  (WV00002)

{"CardCode":"ABC105","NumAtCard":"ABC20240710","DocDueDate":"2024-07-15","DocDate":"2024-07-10","TaxDate":"2024-07-10","DocumentLines":[{"LineNum":2,"ItemCode":"Itm23","Quantity":12.000000,"Price":74.290000,"Currency":"PHP","VatGroup":"OVAT-V","WhsCode":"NV00002","AcctCode":"40000100","DocDate":"2024-07-09","BaseLine":2,"BaseEntry":3000,"BaseType":23,"BaseRef":351000,},{"LineNum":3,"ItemCode":"Itm37","Quantity":20.000000,"Price":139.780000,"Currency":"PHP","VatGroup":"OVAT-V","WhsCode":"NV00002","AcctCode":"40000100","DocDate":"2024-07-09","BaseLine":3,"BaseEntry":300,"BaseType":23,"BaseRef":351000}]}

The Sales Order draft created from the Service Layer call has the WhsCode WV00002.

Assistance in resolving this matter will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Windows Patch Update for SQL Server 2017 RTM GDR KB5029375 on SQL 2017
entry.content:
Hi All

How to verify is it safe to update these Windows Patch Updates such as Update for SQL Server 2017 RTM GDR KB5029375 on SQL 2017 in SAP Server Windows Server 2019, SAP Business One Version 10, MSSQL Server 2017?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Double Sort criteria in Query
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to have dual auto sorting criteria in User Defined Query?  Example first sorting by date followed by Document Number?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Changing the way Actual Customs allocates from Quantity to Value in landed cost
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are trying to find a way to allocate actual cost in landed costs by item value and not by quantity.

Is it possible to do so?

For example, we have the following landed cost

Here we have 100 pcs in total and 100 EUR. The system automatically allocates the value of 100 EUR per quantity by dividing the quantity of items with the actual customs amount, and therefore we get the values in customs value column. (100psc/100EUR = 1EUR per quantity)*line quantity

What we want, is to make it calculate the allocated values by dividing the base doc value of the items with the actual customs. (100EUR/780EUR = 0,1282EUR per EUR) and afterward multiply with the line's total value to populate the column customs value.

Is there any configuration for that?

Thank you,

Best regards,

Vassilis Mamakos

entry.title: Transaction Notification for 'issue for production' impacts 'Receipt from production' also
entry.content:
Created Below Validation for Issue For Production But It Impacts Receipt From production also

------Issue From Prod-Kindly choose WIP Warehouse

IF (@transaction_type IN ('A','U') AND (@object_type = '60')
BEGIN IF EXISTS
(Select T1.DocEntry
from IGE1 T0
Inner Join OIGE T1 On T0.DocEntry=T1.DocEntry
Where T0.DocEntry=@list_of_cols_val_tab_del
AND T1.ObjType='60' AND T0.BaseType = '202'
AND T0.WhsCode<> 'U3WIP'
)
begin
set @error =1060
SET @error_message = 'Kindly choose WIP Warehouse'
END
END

entry.title: SAP B1: UDO form can still be edited after Close
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have registered a UDO with both Closed and Calcel services.

I close the form and the "Status" fields reads 'C'.

When I open that form again, I am still able to edit it and even update the form.

I need the form un-editable after closed status.

How do I achieve this?

Please help.

Regards,

entry.title: Old approval alerts have been appearing in the SAP B1 mobile application since the upgrade.
entry.content:
Old approval alerts are appearing in the SAP B1 mobile application since the upgrade to the latest PL FP2405.

1st Attachment: a list of very old approval alerts from 2019 that suddenly started appearing after the recent upgrade.

2nd Attachment: This is the error message I get when I click on an old approval alert.

I believe there is some new configuration setting in the new PL that I need to change in order to remove all these old alerts from my mobile application.

entry.title: SAP B1 Service Layer: error code - 206 (Bad Patch content)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

May I ask how to fix this error? I encountered a 206 error code in the SAP B1 service layer, but my JSON seems correct. Additionally, when I run my query and get the JSON code to run in the POSTMAN API, it works and the changes reflect in SAP B1.

 



JSON:

 

{"DocumentEntry":23277,
"DocumentNumber":10023269,
"Remarks":"TEST 2",
"InventoryCountingLines":[
    {
         "LineNumber": 6,
        "ItemCode":"HB008434",
    "WarehouseCode":"W00001",
    "BinEntry":3222
},

    {
         "LineNumber": 7,
        "ItemCode":"HB008822",
    "WarehouseCode":"W00001",
    "BinEntry":3222
    } 
]
}
 
 
 
Thank you in Advance

entry.title: Ocorreu erro interno (-5002) [Mensagem 131-183]
entry.content:
Prezados, 

Ao retirar um lote de determinado pedido, o seguinte erro é exibido ao atualizar o documento:

Ocorreu erro interno (-5002) [Mensagem 131-183]

Segue as etapas:

Atenciosamente,

Sérgio

entry.title: SBO mailer for mysql not working
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am now configuring my sbo mailer for my sap b1 (version 10.0) (mysql version). 

When I run the service manager as administrator, select the service as 'Job Service - Mailer', the buttons (for start, pause, stop) are all grey. The button for 'Database' is also grey. ( I finished the smtp server setup in the Settings

I am pretty sure the smtp server is working (I successfully set a smtp server for a hana version)

When I go to the SLD, all the Alert and Mailer is enabled under the 'DB Instances and Companies' Tab.

Then I go to the 'Services' tab, then go to the 'Job Service - Alert' page, there is only 'Alert Settings', no 'Mailer Settings'

In the SAP Business One Client, I found there is a warning signal on the bottom right of the 'Message Alert Overview' icon 

P.S: I have already set the general settings like below:

Can someone help me out with this? Appreciate.

entry.title: SDK Sample code for Service Call Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi all,

Can anyone provide some sample code on adding a row to the scheduling tab (multiple scheduling) on a service call via SAP B1 SDK.

 

I've had a look through the SDK help file and couldn't see anything, perhaps I missed it.

Any help is appreciated.

Nick

entry.title: Canceled (not restorable) drafts in Approval Status Report
entry.content: How can we remove or restore Canceled (not restorable) drafts in Approval Status Report?

entry.title: Default Activity Type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to change the default activity type to Notes?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP B1 Browser Service is unavailable, Contact your system administrator.
entry.content: SAP B1 browser service stops working and gives error "Service is unavailable. Contact your system administrator." when we click on any alert. This only started happening after the upgrade to the latest version, 10.0 FP2405. When we create a new user, it works fine, but for the existing users, we are getting errors every time a new alert is clicked. Attached is a screenshot of the error.

entry.title: Facing the Unhandled Exception Error while doing the transaction in the SAP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are facing the Unhandled Exception Error while doing the transaction in the SAP.
This issue is only facing Super User as manager.
Other users haven't faced this issue yet.
Please check the attached screenshot & share any workaround.

Regards,
Apurva M

entry.title: How to restrict users from accessing B1_SHF Attachment
entry.content:
Need your suggestions/guidance for:

How to restrict users from accessing B1_SHF and Attachment folder on server. Any user can access the shared files and copy or remove/delete the files from there. This will be security breach to any business. We want to restrict such folders to users where they should not remove anything, and it should not affect any SAP functions.

Version: 10.0 FP 2402 HF1

entry.title: Non-Deductible VAT Code and Freight in Purchase Invoice
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,

When recording a purchase invoice using a non-deductible tax code and adding freight in the foot of the document, in the resulting accounting entry the non-deductible part is not added to the cost of the freight but to the cost of the invoice line item (either using item codes or the service type document).

Thanks in advance for your help,

Federico

entry.title: Find out the last pricing details for the Child Items of BOM or Individual Item
entry.content:
We are creating the RD Code when item is under RnD Level. And after complete the RnD, New SAP Code is created for Production purpose.

Now user require the last pricing details of RnD item against new SAP Code. So I create UDF filed as "U_Ref_RD_No", where User entered the Old RD item against New Code.

Hence following query is written and it works but only for Assembly item. I want to add the condition that whether Old R&D Item is individual item then it shows that only items pricing details or if it is a assembly then it shows the pricing details of the all child items.

SELECT T2.[Itemcode]as 'New Code',T0.[Code] as 'Old RD Ref Assy Code',
T0.[TreeType],
T1.[Code], T1.[ItemName], T1.[Quantity], T1.[Price]as 'Unit Price','Total Price'= T1.[Quantity]*T1.[Price]

FROM OITT T0 INNER JOIN ITT1 T1 ON T0.[Code] = T1.[Father]
INNER JOIN OITM T2 ON T0.[Code] = T2.[U_Ref_RD_No]

WHERE T2.itemcode ='[%0]'
